detail.description:
▣Game Introduction▣

■ The One Who Will Seize Hegemony Over the World

An epic saga centered around the 9 Lords who hold supremacy over the continent

Having arrived in this other world at the call of Orpheus, will you be able to

be reborn as the 10th Lord!

■ MMORPG's First Customizable Growth System

High freedom in weapon selection and growth, leading to changes in combat style

Strategically utilize additional skills through ability and tag combinations

Freely select and switch between var
